name: wire-prose-accept
description: A gadget export entry MAY carry the two optional intent-specific prose fields `description` and `usage`. When present the agent's prose wins over the registered export's text; when omitted, push-time resolution inherits the registered text verbatim. Both are the ONLY wire-authored payload on an export entry.

useLeafletMap.description: Interactive map of the delivery route.
useLeafletMap.usage: Render once the courier location stream is live.
